overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through Night City streets, crossing an intersection to reach the NCART subway station, boarding an elevated train, and riding through the futuristic cityscape as the fog clears to reveal a sunset skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic

pedestrian with illuminated green backpack walking in same direction

tall street lamp illuminating the foggy atmosphere with warm light
multi-lane road with cars moving through the fog, headlights visible

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City sidewalk at night, with the player walking alongside a concrete building. Street lamps cast a warm glow through the thick fog while cars pass by on the right. Other pedestrians walk ahead, including one with a distinctive glowing backpack.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk leading to transit station

events.description: exiting the covered sidewalk area into the open intersection space
crossing the street at the crosswalk toward the NCART station entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching the NCART subway station entrance

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
entrance to the Night City Area Rapid Transit station with illuminated signage
traffic signal post with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the sidewalk into a wide urban intersection, crossing the street via the crosswalk. The NCART station entrance becomes visible ahead through the fog, while traffic lights and scattered pedestrians populate the scene. The concrete building facade recedes behind as the player moves into the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART subway station entrance and boarding platform

events.description: entering the NCART station from the foggy street into the sheltered interior
boarding the train car and perspective shifts to interior view

agents.ego_description: entering the NCART station, walking through the entrance and boarding the train

entered.detail: illuminated green sign reading 'NCART NIGHT CITY AREA RAPID TRANSIT ENTRANCE'
covered station interior with escalators and neon lighting
interior of the NCART train car with seats and large windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters the NCART station, leaving the foggy street behind. Green neon signage marks the entrance as the player proceeds through the station interior and boards the waiting train. The environment transitions from outdoor fog to the enclosed, artificially lit train car.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train interior with panoramic city views

events.description: train accelerates and begins moving through the elevated city tracks
fog clears and lighting shifts from night to sunset dusk as the train rises above street level

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART train and observing the futuristic cityscape through the window

entered.detail: large panoramic window showing the cityscape outside
dense cluster of futuristic glass skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
view of the city from elevated train tracks above street level

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and the view opens up to reveal the sprawling Night City skyline through the window. As the train moves along elevated tracks, the fog clears to show a stunning sunset view of futuristic skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and neon-lit buildings. The lighting transitions from the artificial neon of the streets to the natural warm glow of dusk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, nocturnal sidewalk into the artificial light of a futuristic subway station. It begins with a walk along a concrete building where street lamps cast a warm glow through thick fog and pedestrians, including one with a glowing backpack, move ahead. As the camera leaves the sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection, crossing the street toward the distant NCART station entrance while the building facade recedes. The movement then shifts from the open, misty street into the station interior, marked by vibrant green neon signage. Finally, the environment transitions from the outdoor haze to the enclosed, artificially lit interior of a waiting train car as the player boards.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a station into a sweeping panoramic view of a futuristic metropolis at dusk. It begins as the train departs the platform, with the view through the window gradually opening up to reveal the sprawling Night City skyline. As the train accelerates along the elevated tracks, the lingering fog clears to unveil a vista of towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles. The lighting then shifts from the artificial neon glow of the urban streets to the warm, natural radiance of a sunset. The scene finally expands to showcase the full scale of the neon-lit buildings set against a deepening twilight sky.
